name: Five-Pepper Fajitas (Lf) Revised
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp To 3 tsp Jalapeno peppers; chopped, finely
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the chicken breasts thinly across the grain.
2. In a bowl, mix together lime juice, crushed garlic, black pepper, cumin, and salt.
3. Marinate the chicken in the mixture for at least 30 minutes.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
5. Add sliced bell peppers and scallions to the skillet; sauté until tender.
6. Add diced tomatoes and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
7. Drain any excess water from jalapeno peppers and add to the skillet; stir well.
8. Warm tortillas in a separate dry skillet or oven.
9. Assemble fajitas by layering chicken, bell pepper mixture, cilantro, and salsa onto each tortilla.
10. Fold the tortillas into wraps.
11. Serve immediately.
